creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:

(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #3)

=> Attempting to fetch http://mirror.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz
black%20and%20white.tar.gz                            6546 kB   11 MBps    01s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by kde-icons-black-and-white-2.0.a for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz.



is this still an issue? seems to fetch fine for me.
